$schema: North Star metric — single value tracked every weekly review
definition: A school is counted if (a) subscription_status = 'active', (b) at least 5 student records exist, (c) any of {attendance recorded OR invoice generated} in the last 30 days, AND (d) the school has paid an invoice covering the current month or a future month.
source: Hogwarts production database (neon MCP) — query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tenant WHERE subscription_status = 'active' AND last_active_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

targets.note: Ahmed Baha pilot; not yet paying
King Fahad Schools converts at Professional tier ($99/mo)
Default-alive boundary — 3 paying schools at avg $100/mo ≈ $300 MRR covers 60% of burn
